THECURSEDMOD-RITE.selectPrompt: Exhaust. Choosing a Curse Activates the Rite's Effect.
THECURSEDMOD-DREGS.title: Dregs
THECURSEDMOD-STRIKE_THE_CURSED.title: Strike
THECURSEDMOD-DEFEND_THE_CURSED.title: Defend
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_WAND.title: Cursed Wand
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_WAND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CLEAN_UP_WORKSHOP.title: Clean up Workshop
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_MACE.title: Cursed Mace
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_MACE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_SHIV.title: Cursed Shiv
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_SHIV.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_STAFF.title: Cursed Staff
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_STAFF.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dregs[/gold] cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_BOOMERANG.title: Cursed Boomerang
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_BOOMERANG.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_BLADE.title: Cursed Blade
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Dregs[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-SCINTILLA.selectPrompt: Choose a card to transform into Dregs.
THECURSEDMOD-SCINTILLA.title: Scintilla
THECURSEDMOD-SCINTILLA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Transform a card in your [gold]Discard pile[/gold] into [gold]Dregs[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-SPITEFUL_STRIKE.title: Spiteful Strike
THECURSEDMOD-SPITEFUL_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you [gold]Exhausted[/gold] a [gold]Curse[/gold] via [gold]Rite[/gold] this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
THECURSEDMOD-OBSCURATION.title: Obscuration
THECURSEDMOD-ASHES_TO_ASHES.title: Ashes to Ashes
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_MIRROR.title: Cursed Mirror
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_MIRROR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add an [gold]Enthralled[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-ANGER_CONTROL.title: Anger Control
THECURSEDMOD-ANGER_CONTROL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Add a [gold]Normality[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-BLESSING_IN_DISGUISE.title: Blessing in Disguise
THECURSEDMOD-BLESSING_IN_DISGUISE.descri:
Exhaust all [gold]Curse[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_SPELLBOOK.title: Cursed Spellbook
THECURSEDMOD-CURSED_SPELLBOOK.descriptio:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Shuffle a random [gold]Curse[/gold] into your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-FLESH_FROM_BONE.title: Flesh from Bone
THECURSEDMOD-MALEVOLENCE.title: Malevolence
THECURSEDMOD-MALEVOLENCE.description:
Add a random [gold]Rite[/gold] card to your hand.
It costs [blue]0[/blue] this turn.
THECURSEDMOD-ANTI_AGING.title: AntiAging
THECURSEDMOD-ANTI_AGING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Rite[/gold] : Raise your max HP by {MaxHp:diff()}.
THECURSEDMOD-DEMONIC_BLADE.title: Demonic Blade
THECURSEDMOD-DEMONIC_BLADE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each Curse exhausted via [gold]Rite[/gold] this combat.
